page_metadata.biotools__summary: ReadTools is an open‐source toolkit designed to standardize and preprocess sequencing read data from different platforms. It manages FASTQ‐ and SAM‐formatted inputs while dealing with platform‐specific peculiarities and provides a standard SAM compliant output.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ReadTools is an open‐source toolkit designed to standardize and preprocess sequencing read data from different platforms. It manages FASTQ‐ and SAM‐formatted inputs while dealing with platform‐specific peculiarities and provides a standard SAM compliant output.
